query:
-- Re-anchor seeded recurring sessions to the literal local clock times Marcy
-- specified (Madison/Sophie 10:00, Keith 11:00) rather than whatever the
-- script's Date.toISOString() round-trip produced. tutorOfDay reads getHours()
-- on the JS Date object so the value stored MUST be the local clock time we
-- want to display.
UPDATE tutorSessions
   SET scheduledAt = DATE_FORMAT(scheduledAt, '%Y-%m-%d 10:00:00')
 WHERE focus LIKE 'Week % · Monday tutor session'
    OR focus LIKE 'Week % · Tuesday tutor session'
    OR focus LIKE 'Week % · Wednesday tutor session'
    OR focus LIKE 'Week % · Friday tutor session';

UPDATE tutorSessions
   SET scheduledAt = DATE_FORMAT(scheduledAt, '%Y-%m-%d 11:00:00')
 WHERE focus LIKE 'Week % · Thursday tutor session';

SELECT t.name, ts.scheduledAt, ts.durationMin, ts.status, LEFT(ts.focus, 50) AS focus
FROM tutorSessions ts JOIN tutors t ON t.id = ts.tutorId
WHERE ts.scheduledAt BETWEEN '2026-05-11' AND '2026-05-15'
ORDER BY ts.scheduledAt;
command:

UPDATE tutorSessions

    OR focus LIKE 'Week % · Wednesday tutor session'
    OR focus LIKE 'Week % · Friday tutor session';

UPDATE tutorSessions
   SET scheduledAt = DATE_FORMAT(scheduledAt, '%Y-%m-%d 11:00:00')

SELECT t.name, ts.scheduledAt, ts.durationMin, ts.status, LEFT(ts.focus, 50) AS focus
FROM tutorSessions ts JOIN tutors t ON t.id = ts.tutorId

ORDER BY ts.scheduledAt;
